description: Study 8: geometric adversarial corpus. 8 problems x 2 variants, engineered to be picture-decisive and sampling-fragile (corpus built and 8/8 verified by experiments/geometric_corpus/verify.py). Pre-registered run: 8 problems x 30 cells = 240.
motivation: Construct the strongest possible case for visualization: if forced_visual ever beats forced_textual it must happen on a corpus where a plot is decisive but naive sampling fails.
formal_results: Corpus built and verified: verify.py --all -> 8/8 PASS (all problems confirmed picture-decisive + sampling-fragile). No run results yet (no results/ directory); the A/B comparison testing H8 has not been executed.
results_description: Apparatus complete and verified; experiment not yet run.
conclusions: Pending. Pre-declared as both-ways-publishable: if forced_visual beats forced_textual -> first positive visualization result; if not -> 'modality doesn't matter' survives a corpus built to break it.
